formula_or_rule: Sum 6 organ-system scores (each already graded 0-4), total 0-24: respiration_points + coagulation_points + liver_points + cardiovascular_points + cns_points + renal_points.

condition_rules.respiration_points: PaO2/FiO2 ratio (mmHg): >=400=0, <400=1, <300=2, <200 with respiratory support=3, <100 with respiratory support=4
condition_rules.cardiovascular_points: MAP or vasopressor doses: MAP>=70=0, MAP<70=1, dopamine<=5 or dobutamine any=2, dopamine>5 or epi/norepi<=0.1=3, dopamine>15 or epi/norepi>0.1=4 (vasopressor thresholds only apply if vasopressors are documented as administered)
condition_rules.renal_points: creatinine (mg/dL) or urine output: <1.2=0, 1.2-1.9=1, 2.0-3.4=2, 3.5-4.9 or urine<500mL/day=3, >=5.0 or urine<200mL/day=4
